ddls:
CREATE TABLE "texts" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text entry */,
  "clean_text" TEXT /* Cleaned version of the text for analysis */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags associated with the text */,
  "emotion_scores" TEXT /* Scores for various emotions detected in the text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the text was created */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the text data */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the text */,
  "processed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text was processed for sentiment analysis */,
  "entitymentions" TEXT /* Extracted entity mentions from the text */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic or category associated with the text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotions" (
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotion type */,
  "emotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the emotion (e.g., anger, joy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emotion */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the emotion (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the emotion (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text entry being analyzed */,
  "overall_sentiment" TEXT /* Overall sentiment assessment (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Overall sentiment score */,
  "emotion_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of emotions detected in the text */,
  "topic_model" TEXT /* Topic model used for analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtag_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag metric */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* The hashtag being analyzed */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how often the hashtag was used */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Average sentiment score for texts containing the hashtag */,
  "co_occurrence" TEXT /* Co-occurrence of the hashtag with other hashtags */,
  "related_hashtags" TEXT /* Related hashtags that frequently appear with the given hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the text */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, analyze) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis being commented on */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user */,
  "follow_up" TEXT /* Follow-up actions or responses to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analytics ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
